ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "pm_5" INTEGER /* PM 5+ concentration */,
  "pm2_5" INTEGER /* PM 2.5+ concentration */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of day */,
  "pm_fine" REAL /* PM fine concentration */,
  "pm_2_5_federal_standard" INTEGER /* PM 2.5 federal standard concentration */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type (e.g., Celsius, percentage, ppm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* User's research interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the dataset (e.g., research, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., data source, location) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
